---
title: "Miss Birley"
---

## Miss Birley

**Dates:** (fl.1864)

### Description

lender of Salverte’s <i>History of the Names of Men</i> in 1864

### Biography

Probably not Caroline Birley (1851-1907) who seems too young.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 2nd [1864] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
